title: Senior Frontend Engineer
snippet: We are looking for a Senior Frontend Engineer with 5+ years of experience in React, TypeScript...
content:
Senior Frontend Engineer at TechCorp Inc.

Requirements:
- 5+ years of experience with React and TypeScript
- Experience with state management (Redux, Zustand)
- Strong understanding of web performance optimization
- Team lead experience preferred
- AWS/GCP experience
- FinTech domain knowledge is a plus

title: Full Stack Developer
snippet: Join our fast-growing team as a Full Stack Developer. Experience with React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL...
content:
Full Stack Developer at StartupXYZ

Requirements:
- 3+ years with React and Node.js
- PostgreSQL or MongoDB experience
- REST API design
- CI/CD pipelines
- Startup environment experience preferred

title: React Native Developer
snippet: Looking for a React Native developer to build cross-platform mobile applications...
content:
React Native Developer at MobileFirst Ltd.

Requirements:
- 3+ years React Native
- iOS and Android deployment
- Offline-first architecture
- GraphQL experience
